slug_convention: The :latest tag is the default for any model and MUST be omitted from model names and slugs. Only explicit non-default tags (e.g. :14b, :q8_0, :bf16) are included.

backend_notes.qwen3.5:35b-a3b-q2_k_l: Runs via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. Ollama 0.17.8-rc4 still fails to load qwen35moe.
backend_notes.omnicoder:9b-q4_k_m: Benchmarked via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. Ollama 0.17.8-rc4 imports it, but local runner allocation fails on this machine.
backend_notes.qwen3.5:27b-claude-4.6-opus-reasoning-di: Benchmarked via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. Ollama 0.17.8-rc4 imports it, but local runner cannot load qwen35.
Benchmarked via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. This smaller follow-up quant improves memory use and speed versus Q3_K_M, but still only scores 1/5 on the quick suite.
backend_notes.zac/phi4-tools: T5500 Ollama 0.18.1: 31.86 tok/s, 2/5 quality. Previously failed on 0.18.0.
backend_notes.qwen3.5:27b-claude-4.6-opus-reasoning-di: Ollama 0.18.1 cannot load 27B qwen35 architecture on T5500 (unknown model architecture error). 9B variant works.
backend_notes.qwen3.5:9b: T5500 champion tier: 38.87 tok/s, 5/5 quality, 8.2GB VRAM, PPL 3.89 on Ollama 0.18.1.
backend_notes.qwen3.5:4b: T5500 best value: 55.66 tok/s, 5/5 quality, 5.73GB VRAM, PPL 4.62 on Ollama 0.18.1.
backend_notes.qwen3:8b: T5500: 48.65 tok/s, 5/5 quality on Ollama 0.18.1. Failed on 0.18.0.
backend_notes.cogito:14b: T5500 best PPL: 34.36 tok/s, 5/5 quality, 9.05GB VRAM, PPL 3.47.
backend_notes.mistral-small-4: 119B MoE (128 experts, 4 active, 6.5B active/token). Not yet on Ollama library — use llama-server with bartowski GGUF. Framework (96GB RAM + 12GB VRAM): Q3_K_M (54.6GB) is the sweet spot; Q4_K_M (72.6GB) fits tight; IQ4_XS (63.8GB) is a good middle ground. T5500 (36GB RAM + 12GB VRAM): only IQ1 quants fit, too lossy to be meaningful.
backend_notes.nemotron-cascade-2: T5500: cannot load. MoE 30B-A3B model needs 22.6 GiB system memory; T5500 has 36GB RAM + 12GB VRAM but only ~22.4 GiB available after OS/CUDA overhead. Even smallest HF quant (IQ1_S) is 18GB due to MoE floor. Crashes Ollama service on load attempt. Strix-only (5/5, 27.83 tok/s there).
backend_notes.sam860/LFM2:2.6b: Framework: 67.5 tok/s, 2/5 quality (coding 2/2, tool 0/2, agentic 0/1). With custom tool template (LFM2-2.6b-tools): 3/5 (tool 1/2). Template fix in models/LFM2-2.6b-tools.Modelfile.
backend_notes.gemma3:12b: Framework: 36.6 tok/s. Default Ollama template lacks tool handling — scores 2/5 (tool 0/2). With custom tool template (gemma3-12b-tools): 4/5 (tool 2/2). Template fix in models/gemma3-12b-tools.Modelfile. Applies to all gemma3 sizes (4b/12b/27b).
